message:
feat: Pattern 5 export shape normalization for CJS/ESM translation (bd-k5q5.8.6)

When an extension's default export is not a function, try three fallback
strategies before failing: (5a) unwrap double-wrapped default.default,
(5b) use named 'activate' export, (5c) use default.activate method.
Also closes bd-k5q5.8.5 (Pattern 4 proxy stubs already implemented).
4 integration tests for export shape + 17 unit tests from Pattern 3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
